q: This driver holds the record for most F1 World Championship titles with 7, first achieved in 2004. Name him.
I won 7 F1 World Championships driving for Mercedes, equaling Michael Schumacher's record. Who am I?
This Brazilian driver, widely regarded as one of the greatest ever, tragically died at the 1994 San Marino Grand Prix at Imola. Name him.
I hold the F1 record for most race wins in a single season with 19, set during the 2023 season driving for Red Bull. Who am I?
This French driver won 4 F1 World Championships and was known for his fierce rivalry with Ayrton Senna. Name him.
This Argentine driver won 5 World Championships between 1951 and 1957, a record that stood for 46 years. Name him.
Ferrari holds the record for most Constructors' Championships in F1 history. How many have they won as of the end of 2024?
I became the youngest F1 World Champion in history at age 23, winning my first title in 2010 with Red Bull. Who am I?
This British driver won the F1 World Championship in 2009 driving for Brawn GP, the team's only season in F1. Name him.
I hold the record for most F1 Grand Prix starts without a race win, accumulating over 200 starts. I drove for teams including Sauber and Force India. Who am I?
This Finnish driver, nicknamed 'The Iceman,' won his sole F1 World Championship in 2007 driving for Ferrari. Name him.
